channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Mitski Figures It Out & Feels the Love With First of Six Shows at NYC Shed Residency: Recap and Best Moments
item.description: Mitski's soaring at her NYC residency 🚀🎶 Rewind the magic moments with us! 💫 #Mitski #LiveMusic #NYCConcerts

item.title: Beck Announces Symphony-Backed Australian Shows for 2026
item.description: 🎶 Beck is bringing the symphony vibes Down Under in 2026! Prepare for a musical extravaganza! 🇦🇺 #BeckInAustralia #SymphonyMagic

item.title: Maya Hawke Announces New Album and Spring Tour
item.description: 🌸✨ Pump up the volume! Maya Hawke is hitting the road with new tunes! Who's ready to dance? 💃🎶 #MayaHawke #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Billy Corgan Claims Rock Was Deliberately Marginalized — Joseph Kahn Argues Political Correctness Killed It
item.description: 🎸 Billy Corgan sounds off on rock's fate! Joseph Kahn joins the debate 🤔 Who's side are you on? 🤘 #RockDebate #MusicNews

item.title: Sting Announces 2026 Fall North American Tour Dates
item.description: 🌟 Get ready to rock with Sting in 2026! 🎸🎶 Tag your concert buddy! #Sting2026Tour

item.title: Fans Choose RAYE’s ‘Nightingale Lane’ as This Week’s Favorite New Music
item.description: 🎉 Let's groove to RAYE's 'Nightingale Lane'! Fans are vibing with this week's top track! 🎶 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Fred again.. Brought Out Thomas Bangalter For Daft Punk Classics At London Residency Closer
item.description: When Fred again.. and Thomas Bangalter hit the stage, magic happens! 🎶✨ #DaftPunk #LondonResidency

item.title: RÜFÜS DU SOL Announce 2026 North American Tour: How to Get Tickets
item.description: Dance your way into the future with RÜFÜS DU SOL! 🌟 Score tickets now for their electrifying 2026 North American Tour! 🎶 #RÜFÜSDUSOL #NorthAmericanTour

item.title: Watch Billy Strings, Emmylou Harris, Alison Krauss, & More Play O Brother, Where Art Thou? Soundtrack 25th Anniversary Concert
item.description: 🎶 Join the ultimate bluegrass party with Billy Strings, Emmylou Harris, Alison Krauss, and more! Celebrating 25 years of O Brother, Where Art Thou? soundtrack magic! 🎉 #OBrother25

item.title: Mumford & Sons Surprise With Hozier, Dessner On ‘SNL’
item.description: Whoa, Mumford & Sons team up with Hozier and Dessner on 'SNL'! 🎶 Unexpected musical magic coming your way! ✨ #MusicCollab #SNLJam

item.title: ‘SNL’: Watch Mumford & Sons Perform ‘Rubber Band Man,’ ‘Here’
item.description: 🎸 Mumford & Sons rocked 'SNL' with 'Rubber Band Man' and 'Here'! 🙌 Who caught their electric performance? #MumfordAndSons #SNL #LiveMusicVibes

item.title: Jean-Michel Jarre to Make Ibiza Debut at Amnesia This Summer
item.description: 🎶 Ibiza is in for a treat as Jean-Michel Jarre hits the Amnesia stage this summer! Who's ready to dance? 💃 #MusicNews #JeanMichelJarre

item.title: Wu-Tang Clan Co-Founder Oliver ‘Power’ Grant Died After ‘Courageous’ Battle With Cancer
item.description: 🎤 Rest in Power, Oliver 'Power' Grant. Your legacy with Wu-Tang Clan will live on forever 🙌🏽💥 #RIPPowerGrant

item.title: Robbie Williams Leads All-Star Tribute To Lifetime Achievement Winner Ozzy Osbourne At The 2026 BRITs
item.description: 🎉 Get ready to rock out with Robbie Williams and Ozzy Osbourne at the 2026 BRITs! 🎸🤘 #LegendsUnite #RockOn

item.title: Times New Viking Reunite For First Show In A Decade
item.description: 🚀 Legends return! Times New Viking are back with a bang! 🎉 Let the music celebration begin! 🎸 #TimesNewViking #MusicLegends
